category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the CLI for the FastAPI framework; the official FastAPI site describes FastAPI as a Python web framework for APIs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official FastAPI site and uses FastAPI as the project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official FastAPI documentation site.
repo_sources: Official FastAPI documentation lists Source Code as https://github.com/fastapi/fastapi; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was determined from official docs.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the FastAPI CLI; official FastAPI documentation describes the framework as a modern Python web framework for building APIs.
